onChange.script:
# Fires once on view-load (now(0) is single-eval -> binding evaluates true).
	# Calls resetFilter which seeds dates + runs Apply.
	if previousValue and previousValue.value != currentValue.value:
		self.rootContainer.resetFilter()

transforms.code: return [{"label": "(All)", "value": None}] + [{"label": t.get("Name"), "value": t.get("Code")} for t in (value or [])]
return [{"label": "(All)", "value": None}] + [{"label": t.get("ProcedureName"), "value": t.get("ProcedureName")} for t in (value or [])]

config.expression: if({view.custom.totalCount} < 1000, "Showing " + {view.custom.totalCount} + " rows", "Showing first 1000 of " + {view.custom.totalCount} + " — narrow your filter")

config.script:
row = event.row if hasattr(event, "row") else None
	data = row.data if row and hasattr(row, "data") else None
	if data is None:
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-failure-detail",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/FailureDetail",
		modal=True,
		draggable=False,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"id":                  data.get("Id"),
			"attemptedAt":         data.get("AttemptedAt"),
			"userDisplayName":     data.get("UserDisplayName"),
			"logEntityTypeName":   data.get("LogEntityTypeName"),
			"entityId":            data.get("EntityId"),
			"logEventTypeCode":    data.get("LogEventTypeCode"),
			"procedureName":       data.get("ProcedureName"),
			"failureReason":       data.get("FailureReason"),
			"attemptedParameters": data.get("AttemptedParameters")
		}
	)

customMethods.name: applySearch
customMethods.script:
result = BlueRidge.Audit.FailureLog.search(self.view.custom.filter)
	self.view.custom.rows       = result["rows"]
	self.view.custom.totalCount = result["totalCount"]
	self.view.custom.topReasons = result["topReasons"]
	self.view.custom.topProcs   = result["topProcs"]

customMethods.name: resetFilter
customMethods.script:
import system
	now = system.date.now()
	self.view.custom.filter = {
		"startDate":      system.date.addDays(now, -7),
		"endDate":        now,
		"entityTypeCode": None,
		"procedureName":  None,
		"appUserId":      None,
		"searchText":     ""
	}
	self.applySearch()

messageHandlers.script:
field = payload.get("field") if payload else None
	value = payload.get("value") if payload else None
	if not field:
		return
	f = dict(self.view.custom.filter or {})
	if field == "failureReasonText":
		f["searchText"] = value or ""
	elif field == "procedureName":
		f["procedureName"] = value
	self.view.custom.filter = f
	self.applySearch()
